name: Schedule Overview
subject: Project Schedule: {project_name} ({date})
body:
Dear Team,

Please find attached the latest Gantt chart for the {project_name} project as of {date}.

The chart provides a complete overview of all tasks, milestones, dependencies, and current progress. Please review your assigned tasks and notify {project_manager} of any concerns.

Key points to note:
  - Tasks shown in red are on the critical path
  - Progress bars indicate percentage completion
  - Dashed bars indicate baselined dates where available

If you have any questions please contact {project_manager}.

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
body_html:
Dear Team,

Please find below the latest Gantt chart for the {project_name} project as of {date}. The chart is also attached as an SVG file for offline use.

{svg_inline}

Key points to note:

  • Tasks shown in red are on the critical path
  • Progress bars indicate percentage completion
  • Dashed bars indicate baselined dates where available

If you have any questions please contact {project_manager}.

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
